mapper.sql: SELECT c.*, a.audit_name FROM tb_legal_compliance_corrective c LEFT JOIN tb_legal_compliance_exec a ON c.audit_id = a.id
mapper.select: WHERE c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_compliance_corrective WHERE deleted = 0
WHERE c.status = #{status} AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_compliance_corrective WHERE status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
WHERE c.audit_id = #{auditId} AND c.deleted = 0 ORDER BY c.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_compliance_corrective WHERE audit_id = #{auditId} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_compliance_corrective WHERE corrective_id LIKE #{prefix} + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_legal_compliance_corrective ( corrective_id, finding_id, audit_id, finding_description, severity, action_description, responsible_name, responsible_dept, due_date, status, notes, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{correctiveId}, #{findingId}, #{auditId}, #{findingDescription}, #{severity}, #{actionDescription}, #{responsiblePerson}, #{responsibleDept}, #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{status}, #{notes}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_legal_compliance_corrective SET finding_id = #{findingId}, audit_id = #{auditId}, finding_description = #{findingDescription}, severity = #{severity}, action_description = #{actionDescription}, responsible_name = #{responsiblePerson}, responsible_dept = #{responsibleDept}, due_date = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, status = #{status}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_legal_compliance_corrective SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
